title: dupatya pubescens
intro: Dupatya pubescens, also known as Himalayan Balsam's relative, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Pentaphragmataceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dupatya pubescens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
